name: tinkatuff
flavor_texts: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.
text: Tinkatuff is the Hammer Pokémon. It is a fairy and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: mold-breaker, own-tempo, pickpocket (hidden). Base stats — HP: 65, Attack: 55, Defense: 55, Sp. Atk: 45, Sp. Def: 82, Speed: 78. Evolution line: tinkatink → tinkatuff → tinkaton. Lore: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer. These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.
